narrative.headline: What 2014 Ram 1500 owners report most
narrative.summary: Steering complaints dominate owner reports for this Ram truck, with drivers describing the vehicle drifting or wandering unpredictably while in motion. Engine and fuel system issues also appear frequently, with owners reporting visible smoke during acceleration and persistent check engine lights that dealers struggled to resolve over extended periods. Electrical problems round out the top concerns, including unexplained battery drain that leaves the truck unable to start and spontaneous activation of suspension and instrument cluster systems.

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle drifting or wandering from side to side while driving at various speeds. · 1 fire · 21 crash · 9 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report large amounts of white smoke appearing during acceleration, even on trucks driven only a short time after purchase. · 14 fire · 2 crash · 12 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report an unknown electrical draw that drains the battery until the vehicle will not start, along with spontaneous activation of the electric suspension and console cluster. · 6 fire · 9 crash · 6 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report a persistent check engine light that remains on through repeated dealer repair attempts spanning many months without resolution. · 7 fire · 2 crash · 3 injured
